hooks.command: echo '--- Verity Status ---' && git -C ~/verity/mobile status --short | head -5 && echo '--- Last 3 commits ---' && git -C ~/verity/mobile log --oneline -3 && echo '--- TypeScript ---' && cd ~/verity/mobile && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -1
python3 -c "import json, sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); sys.exit(2 if any(x in p for x in ['.env','supabase/migrations/','package-lock.json']) else 0)"
osascript -e 'display notification "Claude Code session finished" with title "Verity Build"'
